Terms of Service

Last Updated: May 13, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By using AuraSpend, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

2. Use License

Permission is granted to use AuraSpend for personal financial management. You may not redistribute or modify the software without authorization.

3. Premium Version

Premium features are provided as a one-time or subscription purchase. All sales are subject to the terms of the app store used for purchase.

4. Disclaimer

AuraSpend provides tools for tracking expenses. It is not a professional financial advisory service. We are not responsible for any financial decisions made based on the app's data.
